title: RFA Thanks President Trump for Taking Action to Counter Brazil Ethanol Tariff
content: The Renewable Fuels Association thanked President Trump for his commitment to reestablishing a fair and reciprocal ethanol trading relationship with Brazil. While Brazilian-made ethanol has enjoyed virtually duty-free access to the U.S. market since 2012, Brazil has implemented tariffs and disruptive trade barriers against imports of U.S. ethanol starting in 2017. As a result of Brazilâ€™s punitive tariffs, U.S. ethanol exports to Brazil have essentially dried up in recent yearsâ€”despite American-made ethanol being the most cost-competitive renewable fuel in the world.
author: Analysts Account
